name: otio-diff
description: Structural editorial diff between two timelines: which clips were added, removed, retimed, moved, or shifted between cut A and cut B. Reads any format an installed OpenTimelineIO adapter supports (.otio built in; .edl/.fcpxml/.aaf via adapter plugins).

exit_codes.2: could not read an input file

output.human: summary line plus per-item detail lines with frame-accurate deltas

json.added: clip records present only in revised
json.removed: clip records present only in baseline
json.shifted: {key, before, after} — slid on the timeline (ripple only)

output.notes: all six keys always present; times are float seconds; multiply by 'rate' for frames; stdout carries only the result, errors go to stderr
